entities.name: Job Search Dietary Balance
entities.context: Framework comparing sustainable job searching to balanced diet - stable opportunities as foundation, high-leverage 'screamer shots' as peaks

entities.name: Stable High-Probability Opportunities
entities.context: Foundation roles that maintain psychological and financial momentum during job search

entities.name: Screamer Shots
entities.context: High-leverage, outsized-potential opportunities that offer transformational growth but lower probability

entities.name: Portfolio Balance Check
entities.context: Coaching intervention that audits candidate's opportunity mix to prevent over-indexing on reach or safe roles

entities.name: Search Fatigue
entities.context: Psychological depletion state caused by lack of positive reinforcement in job search feedback loops

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company - domain where this job search coaching framework applies

relationships.context: Stable opportunities form the 'nutritional base' of the balanced search portfolio
High-leverage shots are the 'peak' component offering outsized returns
Coaching tool that operationalizes the dietary balance framework
Over-indexing on moonshots without stable base causes rapid burnout
Coaching frameworks should include this check as standard practice
Core belief guiding Careerspan's coaching methodology
